source_pr.title: planner: prohibit StreamAgg with group keys for TiFlash
source_pr.body:
StreamAgg with group keys is not supported on TiFlash.

Issue Number: close #39266

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: No explicit flaky failure signature is described in the PR or reflected in the patch; the changes prohibit an unsupported StreamAgg plan on TiFlash (with group keys) and add a regression test.
failure_signature: No explicit flaky failure signature in patch (bug fix + regression test for TiFlash StreamAgg support).
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR prevents generating an unsupported StreamAgg-with-group-keys plan on TiFlash (returning an invalid task) and adds a regression test to ensure the plan avoids StreamAgg on TiFlash. The patch does not provide a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization fix for an intermittent failure, so keep this case as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: Reject unsupported StreamAgg-on-TiFlash plans (with group keys) and add a regression test to assert the plan does not contain StreamAgg on TiFlash.

evidence: evidence: sql := "select a,b,c,count(*) from foo group by a,b,c order by a,b,c" (executor/tiflashtest/tiflash_test.go)

analysis:
